articles.title: WorldVue: OpenWiFi delivers carrier-grade performance at scale with 3,500 deployed devices

articles.title: EchoStar inflated the AWS-3 auction by $1.6 billion
articles.snippet: EchoStar never came to win. It bid the clock up until the total erased its default penalty, then walked with two Guam licenses. Verizon and T-Mobile paid.

This is slightly up from 20.6 million UK homes in Q4 2025. Netflix continued to lead the market in […]
